text: It is oddly quiet, the angular lines and darkness making the environment feel unfamiliar and slightly unnerving. There is a certain weight to the stillness, a sense of anticipation in spaces usually alive with activity and conversation. I find myself curious about the stories these walls have witnessed, yet I am also cautious, alert to the mystery that shadows bring. I question whether this silence is inviting reflection—or hinting that I am somewhere I should not linger.
